bugs.summary: The proposed patch treats thinking levels explicitly mapped to null as supported.
bugs.impact: Provider model metadata uses null to disable unsupported reasoning levels. Returning those levels from `getSupportedThinkingLevels` can let workflows select a reasoning level the provider cannot run.
acceptableFixes: Add a unit test where `{ low: null }` excludes low from supported levels.
mustNotSay: Null and undefined mean the same thing in thinkingLevelMap.

mustAvoidClaims: Using prior A/B run notes as evidence.
Relying on git history instead of the sanitized workspace and proposed patch.

difficulty.rationale: Requires understanding null-vs-undefined provider metadata semantics.

approval.notes: Second-wave draft; validate/materialize only. Requires calibration and provider review before lock.
